name: Bug Report
about: Report something that is broken or behaving unexpectedly

labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.5 (Anaconda) |
| HPC Companion version / commit | e.g. v0.1.0 or commit abc1234 |
| Running from | source (`python main.py`) / packaged exe |

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open the application
2. Navigate to ...
3. Click / type ...
4. Observe ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. If there is an error message or traceback, paste it here as text:

```
<paste error output here>
```

## Additional Context

- SLURM version on your cluster (if relevant): `sinfo --version`
- Any other detail that might help reproduce the issue
